import { toHash } from '../to-hash'; describe('to-hash', () => { it('regression', () => { const res = toHash('goober'); expect(res).toEqual('go1990315141'); expect(toHash('goober')).toEqual('go1990315141'); }); it('collision', () => { const a = toHash('background:red;color:black;'); const b = toHash('background:black;color:red;'); expect(a === b).toBeFalsy(); }); });
